CustomField.description: This field is automatically populated from the Rent Slip->End Date for Rent invoices, from the Utilization->End Date for Aircraft MR invoices, from Interest End Date for Interest invoices, from Reconciliation End Date for Non-MR invoices, from Sublease Invoice->Period End Date for HL/SL invoices (both Rent and MR), from 'Invoice Deferred From' ->Period End Date. For all other types, it is manually entered on the invoice.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Autofilled from Rent end for Rent/Utilization end for MR/Interest end for Interest/Reconciliation end for Non MR/Sublease invoice end for HL/SL and related Rent or MR end for Deferred Rent/MR invoices. Manually entered for other invoice types.
CustomField.label: Period End Date
